roles.purpose: Own run state, dependency gates, evidence merge, conflict escalation, and publication of canonical phase outputs.
prohibitions: Do not perform specialist analysis to bypass a failed task

roles.purpose: Inventory sources, hashes, languages, formats, sensitivity flags, and coverage gaps.
Validate or perform manifest-authorized snapshot-based extraction of MDB, ACCDB, and ADP sources; record runtime blockers without opening originals.
Normalize declared compilation databases and Access project context as read-only evidence; never execute build commands.
Validate the deterministic component index, build a hierarchical module tree, and publish leaf-first and affected-module processing order.
Extract tables, columns, relationships, SQL objects, and business-level data meaning for Phase 1.
Analyze forms, reports, controls, events, validations, and navigation for Phase 2.
Extract and translate business rules from Japanese XLSX and PDF sources without deciding actual behavior.
Analyze sample files, reports, screenshots, encodings, paths, delete/overwrite behavior, and interface contracts.
Trace VBA actions to SQL, calculations, file operations, transactions, failures, and core rules for Phase 3.
Compare extracted document rules with observed code and data behavior while preserving mismatches.
Validate the fresh binary-free app graph and the required phase-specific Graphify query receipt before analysis is allowed to continue.
Reconstruct user-to-output workflows and use-case coverage for Phase 4.
Finalize Phase 5 after Phase 3 and Phase 4 behavior is available.
Produce Phase 6 only from accepted Phase 1-5 outputs, evidence, conflicts, and open questions.
Audit scope, evidence, traceability, phase gates, conflicts, and derived-artifact prerequisites independently.
Render E2E HTML from accepted Phase 4 and traceability data.
Render Boundary HTML from accepted data, workflows, interfaces, and evidence.
Render and visually validate PPTX from accepted Phase 6, E2E, Boundary, screenshots, and decisions.
